unified_frame_statement: James shares his cautionary tale with Coach Sandra, showing how ignoring early warning signs led to complete burnout and the urgent need for immediate lifestyle change.

state_alpha.sensory_anchor: The chest pains he dismissed as stress every week

the_abyss.realization: "The doctor said next time might be the last."

the_spark.insight_quote: "She asked 'What's worth dying for?' and I couldn't answer." (15:45)

state_omega.result: Blood pressure from 160/100 to 125/80 in 4 months

sensory_anchors: The sharp pain in his chest he kept ignoring
The cold hospital bed during the wake-up call
The calm heartbeat he monitors every morning now
